message:
feat(tui,agent): wire branch-aware model/thinking state through interactive and agent layers

Agent layer (agent.rs, +152 lines):
- AgentExtensionSession::get_state() now delegates to SessionHandle's
  implementation and merges agent-specific fields instead of duplicating
  session state assembly logic
- apply_session_state uses effective_model_for_current_path()
- Tests verify branch-local model and thinking level in agent context

App layer (app.rs, +217 lines):
- update_session_for_selection avoids writing duplicate model/thinking
  history entries when session already has alias-equivalent state
- last_model_from_session and last_thinking_level delegate to
  branch-aware session methods
- New model_from_session_state/thinking_level_from_session_state wrappers
- Tests for header-only restore, branch-only restore, alias dedup

Interactive session (ext_session.rs, +390 lines):
- Rewire InteractiveExtensionSession to use branch-local helpers
  (current_path_model_pair, current_path_thinking_level)
- set_model normalizes provider aliases and deduplicates
- set_thinking_level clamps against the session's actual branch model
- ~180 lines of tests for branch-switching correctness

Interactive agent (interactive/agent.rs, +81 lines):
- Test: fast_tree_navigation_syncs_runtime_model_and_thinking_from_target_branch

Tree UI (tree_ui.rs):
- After branch switch, call sync_runtime_selection_from_session_header()

Keybindings (keybindings.rs):
- Refactor try_lock match arms to let-else style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
